name: worldTimeOnFootMult
description: Multiplier applied to the rate at which world time advances while the player is traveling on foot. Boats always use 1f regardless of this value.

readBy.note: scales elapsed time when player is on-foot

name: marketRateDecayMultMod
description: Additive modifier to the multiplier (default 1.0) that controls how port market rates change each day. Larger values amplify daily market rate fluctuations.

name: marketRateMaxMod
description: Additive modifier to the ceiling on a port's market rate. Default ceiling is 120.

name: marketRateNPCChangePerGPMod
description: Additive modifier to the per-gold-piece adjustment NPC trading makes to a port's market rate. Default base is 0.002.

name: tradeGoodPriceDistanceMultMod
description: Additive modifier to the linear distance multiplier used in trade-good pricing between ports. Default base is 0.002.

name: tradeGoodPriceDistanceSquaredMultMod
description: Additive modifier to the squared-distance multiplier used in trade-good pricing between ports. Default base is 7e-06.

name: tradeGoodPriceDistanceMod
description: Additive modifier to the constant distance bias in trade-good pricing. Default base is 0.12.

name: buyPriceMultMod
description: Additive modifier to the global multiplier applied to item purchase prices. Default base is 1.0.

name: sellPriceMultMod
description: Additive modifier to the global multiplier applied to item sell prices. Default base is 0.25.

name: tradeSpecial_locID
description: Port currently designated as the trade special destination. Selling the matching cargo here yields a bonus; selling clears both this and tradeSpecial_goodsID.

name: tradeSpecial_goodsID
description: Item type currently in high demand at tradeSpecial_locID. Cleared together with the location when the sale is fulfilled.

name: next_tradeSpecial_locID
description: Port scheduled to receive the next month's trade special, used to preview demand a month in advance.

name: next_tradeSpecial_goodsID
description: Item type scheduled to be in high demand at next_tradeSpecial_locID next month.

name: grovesDiscovered
description: Cumulative number of hidden groves the player has discovered. Counts toward the DISCOVER_GROVE1 achievement at 15.

name: portsDiscovered
description: Cumulative number of ports the player has discovered. Counts toward the DISCOVER_PORTS1 achievement at 30.

name: spGroveEnc
description: Counter for special grove encounters. Reset when procgen locations are regenerated.

name: {setPieceID}_added
description: Flag indicating whether a particular procgen set piece has been placed in the overworld. Used to avoid re-placing.

name: mapCompleted
description: Flag set once the world map has been fully unlocked (mapPercentPaid reaches 100).

name: mapPercentPaid
description: Percentage of the world map the player has paid a cartographer to reveal. Reaches 100 to set mapCompleted.

name: firstVisit_{locationID}
description: Flag set the first time the player enters a particular location.

name: firstVisit_newLoc
description: Flag set every time any location is visited for the first time. Used by generic first-visit dialog or scripted events.

name: lastVisit
description: World time (in hours) at which the player last visited the current zone. Used by formulas comparing absence duration.

name: lastVisit_days
description: In-game days elapsed at the last visit to the current zone. Companion to lastVisit.

name: lastProcZoneEntry
description: Identifier of the most recently entered procgen zone, used by triggers that need to remember the last procedural area.

name: zoneGenFailed
description: Flag set when procedural zone generation fails. Triggers a fallback/retry path via tRetryProcgen.

name: {zoneName}_merged
description: Flag set once a zone has been merged with its master version, used to avoid re-merging.

name: {levelData}_{key}
description: Per-zone procgen entry storage. Records that a particular {key} has already been used for {levelData}, so procgen does not pick it again.

name: pauseItemTimers
description: When > 0, suspends item timer updates (despawns, regrowth) globally.

name: cantAutosave
description: When > 0, prevents the game from autosaving even when other autosave conditions are satisfied.

name: autosaveInOverworld
description: Flag set by the tOverworldAutosave global trigger; reacted to by mods/triggers that respond to overworld autosaves.

name: portsEntered
description: Cumulative count of times the player has entered any port. Incremented by tEnterPort.

name: hideTravelUI
description: When > 0, hides the overworld travel UI (morale/food/wind indicators). Useful during cutscenes.

name: disableStash
description: When > 0, hides or disables access to the stash inventory UI element.

name: skipIntro
description: Set during character generation to 1 if the player checked 'Skip Intro'.

name: refreshTown
description: Flag indicating town inhabitants and shops should refresh their daily state.

name: refreshMagi
description: Flag indicating the magi shop/NPC offers should refresh. Initialized to 1 at the start of each refresh cycle.

name: refreshSmith
description: Flag indicating the smith shop/NPC offers should refresh. Initialized to 1 at the start of each refresh cycle.

name: refreshTrainer
description: Flag indicating the trainer NPC offers should refresh. Initialized to 1 at the start of each refresh cycle.

name: refreshInn
description: Flag indicating inn offerings should refresh. Initialized to 1 at the start of each refresh cycle.

name: castleGatesOpen
description: Flag indicating whether a castle's gates are open. Cleared each refresh cycle.

name: gen1
description: Generic refreshable flag #1, cleared by tSetRefreshGlobals each refresh cycle. Mods may use as a temporary marker that resets with the town refresh.

name: gen2
description: Generic refreshable flag #2, cleared by tSetRefreshGlobals each refresh cycle.

name: gen3
description: Generic refreshable flag #3, cleared by tSetRefreshGlobals each refresh cycle.

name: gen4
description: Generic refreshable flag #4, cleared by tSetRefreshGlobals each refresh cycle.

name: gen5
description: Generic refreshable flag #5, cleared by tSetRefreshGlobals each refresh cycle.

name: trainer_chat
description: Flag indicating the player has already had today's gossip/chat with the trainer NPC. Reset to 1 each refresh cycle to allow another chat.

name: smith_chat
description: Flag indicating the player has already had today's gossip/chat with the smith NPC. Reset to 1 each refresh cycle to allow another chat.

name: magi_chat
description: Flag indicating the player has already had today's gossip/chat with the magi NPC. Reset to 1 each refresh cycle to allow another chat.

name: innkeeper_chat
description: Flag indicating the player has already had today's gossip/chat with the innkeeper NPC. Reset to 1 each refresh cycle to allow another chat.

name: bartender_chat
description: Flag indicating the player has already had today's gossip/chat with the bartender NPC. Reset to 1 each refresh cycle to allow another chat.

name: playerFaction
description: Faction the player currently belongs to (their royal allegiance). Empty string or '0' if unaligned.

name: playerRank
description: Player's rank within their faction (1-9). Drives royal quest cadence, favor caps, and repair discounts; reaching 9 unlocks RANK_ROYALMAX.

name: playerTitle
description: Optional display title for the player (e.g., honorifics earned through dialog). Cleared by Task.cs in some flows.

name: partySizeMod
description: Additive modifier to the maximum landing party size. Default base is 5.

name: firstmate
description: Actor ID of the player's appointed first mate. Used as default speaker for many dialog events.

name: playerX
description: Tile X coordinate of the player at the moment of the most recent zone transition or combat start. Used to restore overworld position after fleet battles.

setBy.note: on zone transition or combat start

name: playerY
description: Tile Y coordinate of the player at the moment of the most recent zone transition or combat start.

name: playerPrevZone
description: Zone the player was in immediately before the current one. Used for fleeing back from combat.

name: playerInitiatedFleetBattle
description: Flag indicating whether the player started the current fleet battle (1) or was attacked (0). Affects post-combat dialog and faction reaction.

name: turnNumber
description: Index of the current combat turn, incremented at the start of each new turn.

name: turnsTaken
description: Per-encounter counter of turns the player has taken. Gates first-turn tooltips.

name: cantFleeCombat
description: When >= 1, prevents fleeing the current combat. Seeded by tStartGame for the opening sequence.

name: cantEscape
description: When > 0, prevents the player from leaving the current mission zone. Works with onAMission to lock the player in.

name: dontAutosaveAfterCombat
description: When > 0, suppresses the autosave that normally fires after a victorious non-boat combat.

name: dontAwardAfterCombat
description: When >= 1, suppresses post-combat fame/morale/loot awards. Seeded by tPostgameLoaded for postgame state.

name: enableEnemyRandomActTimers
description: When > 0, enables the random-action timers used by enemies to act outside of strict turn order. Seeded to 1 by tStartGame.

name: enableFormationPhase
description: When > 0, enables the pre-combat formation placement phase. Seeded to 1 by tStartGame.

name: fledFrom
description: Comma-concatenated list of actor IDs the player has fled from. Used to detect repeated flees from the same enemies.

name: fledFromTimes
description: Count of consecutive flees from the same enemies. Reset to 0 after successful combat.

name: combatsWon
description: Cumulative count of combats the player has won.

name: gameOvers
description: Cumulative count of game-over events the player has triggered.

name: shipsBought
description: Cumulative count of ships the player has purchased. Used to generate unique actor IDs for purchased ships.

name: shipBoons
description: Cumulative count of bonus ships granted to the player.

name: shipsCaptured
description: Cumulative count of ships the player has captured from enemy fleets.

name: timesRested
description: Cumulative count of times the player has rested at an inn or campsite.

name: alliancesMade
description: Cumulative count of formal alliances the player has brokered between factions. Stored as a string for use in royal quest progress text.

name: totalRecruits
description: Cumulative count of crew members recruited via the random-hire mechanism.

name: missionsSuccess
description: Cumulative count of mission runs the player has completed successfully (scoreScreen value > 0).

name: valueThisRun
description: Total value (cash + 10% of XP) earned during the most recent mission run. Shown on the score screen.

name: refreshBar
description: Flag set after a successful mission run to indicate the tavern/mission bar should refresh its offerings.

name: deathsThisRun
description: Party members lost during the most recent mission run. Reset by the score screen.

name: cashAdd
description: Scratch accumulator used by the score screen dialog to drip cash into reserves with animations. Modified via the dialog <cmd=gAdd=cashAdd=N> rich-text command (not via setGlobalVar).

setBy.note: reset at start of score screen

notes: Write-only output channel from the score screen dialog; no C# reader.

name: cashEarned
description: Total cash value earned during the most recent mission, including converted loot.

setBy.note: set to player money, incremented per loot

name: moneyReserves
description: Persistent stored money carried between mission runs. Increased by cashEarned at end of run and seeded into the next run via tSetRefreshGlobals.

name: earnedCashTotal
description: Cumulative cash earned across all runs.

name: tradeProfitTotal
description: Cumulative profit (sell minus base buy) the player has earned through trading.

name: earnedXP
description: XP earned during the most recent mission run.

name: earnedXPTotal
description: Cumulative XP earned across all mission runs.

name: {actorClassID}_XP
description: Cumulative XP awarded to a particular actor class across all party members.

name: {actorID}_xp
description: Snapshot of a specific actor's XP at the moment a fleet battle began. Saved for rollback/display.

name: XPShare
description: Percentage (0-100) of earned XP redistributed to absent party members. Set discretely to 5 or 10 by tXPShare triggers.

name: minXPPercentMod
description: Additive modifier to the minimum XP percentage awarded for using class abilities. Default base is 0.03 (3%).

name: learnedPassive
description: Counter incremented as the player learns passive abilities; first learn sets it to 1.

name: class_{classID}
description: Flag set to 1 when the player has unlocked the actor class with the given ID.

readBy.where: actor class fReq formulas, UI gating

name: {actorValueID}_bonus
description: Permanent bonus magnitude (typically from artifacts) applied as a stat modifier to that actor value on every party member on load.

name: alwaysKeepWeaponsUnsheathed
description: When > 0, party members keep their weapons drawn outside combat (visual setting).

name: cargoPenaltySpeedMultAdjust
description: Additive modifier to the boat speed multiplier when overloaded with cargo. Default base is 1.0.

name: ignoreHardcore
description: When >= 1, bypasses hardcore-mode save restrictions, allowing the player to save outside ports. Seeded to 1 by tStartGame.

name: spawnPowerMod
description: Additive modifier to the desired enemy power level when spawning fleets and combat encounters. Added on top of party power level and Globals.enemySpawnPowerMod.

name: fame_explore
description: Player's exploration fame total. Earned from discovering ports/groves and newMonth_stuff; consumed by royal quest gating and gossip.

name: fame_trade
description: Player's trade fame total. Earned from profitable trades; consumed by royal quest gating and merchant interactions.

name: fame_combat
description: Player's combat fame total. Earned from defeating fleets; consumed by royal quest gating, combat dialog, and Faction fleet spawning.

name: fame_piracy
description: Player's piracy fame total. Tracked separately so it doesn't generate the usual fame UI flourishes.

name: fame_{type}

params.name: type
params.note: observed: explore, trade, combat, piracy; mod-extendable

description: Generic player fame in some category. Composed via setGlobalVar('fame_' + type, ...) in GameState.modFame.

readBy.where: various fame thresholds in gossip, quest gating, Faction spawning, achievements

name: trackedFame{N}
description: UI tracker text for fame indicator N. Display string for an active fame-watching widget.

name: trackedFameName{N}
description: UI tracker tooltip text for fame indicator N. Tooltip describing the trackedFameN value.

name: favor_{factionID}
description: Player's favor score with a specific faction. Modified via GameState.modFavor; clamped between -99 and getMaxFavor.

name: {factionID}_merchantFleetsSpawned
description: Cumulative count of merchant fleets spawned for a particular faction.

name: {factionID}_battleFleetsSpawned
description: Cumulative count of battle fleets spawned for a particular faction.

name: fleetsDefeated
description: Cumulative count of enemy fleets the player has defeated across all factions.

name: fleetsDefeated_{factionID}
description: Cumulative count of fleets the player has defeated belonging to a specific faction.

name: battlefleetsDefeated_{factionID}
description: Cumulative count of battle-classed fleets the player has defeated belonging to a specific faction.

name: elitefleetsDefeated_{factionID}
description: Cumulative count of elite-classed fleets the player has defeated belonging to a specific faction.

name: lastCommodoreDefeated
description: Actor ID of the most recently defeated enemy commodore. Used to avoid respawning the same commodore.

name: commodoreEnemy
description: Actor ID of the enemy fleet's commodore for the current combat. Cleared when not in fleet combat.

name: royalQuestType
description: Type of the player's active royal quest. Empty or '0' if no royal quest is active.

name: royalQuestGoal
description: Goal data for the active royal quest. Format depends on royalQuestType (faction ID, item ID, location ID, or alliance count).

name: royalQuestFaction
description: Faction ID for which the active royal quest was issued. Cleared when not on a royal quest.

name: questComplete_r_item
description: Cumulative count of royal item-type quests completed. Soft-capped at 3 by quest selection.

name: questComplete_r_cargo
description: Cumulative count of royal cargo-type quests completed. Soft-capped at 3 by quest selection.

name: questComplete_r_alliance
description: Cumulative count of royal alliance-type quests completed. Soft-capped at 3 by quest selection.

name: questComplete_clearden
description: Used purely for its worldTime stamp via getGlobalVarWorldTimeSinceAssigned. Records when the most recent monster-den clear quest finished, so clearden quests aren't re-offered for 3 hours.

name: questComplete_salvage
description: Used purely for its worldTime stamp via getGlobalVarWorldTimeSinceAssigned. Records when the most recent salvage quest finished, so salvage quests aren't re-offered for 33 hours.

name: questCompleted
description: Flag set to 1 when the active quest is finished. Reset by quest-cleanup tasks.

name: questType
description: Type tag of the player's active non-royal quest. Cleared by Task.cs quest-cleanup handlers.

name: questGoal
description: Goal data for the active non-royal quest. Format depends on questType: ItemType.ID for fetch, ActorType.ID for slay/defeat, Location.ID for travel; special value 'pirate' triggers pirate gossip.

name: questDest
description: Destination location for the player's active quest. Avoids steering port-quest selection to the same place.

name: questReward
description: Reward payload for the player's active quest. Format depends on quest type (e.g., cash amount, item ID).

name: questGiver
description: Actor ID of the NPC who gave the player the active quest.

readBy.where: quest completion handlers and dialog branches

name: questLog
description: Text shown in the journal/UI describing the player's active quest.

name: questLogImage
description: Image/icon used alongside questLog in the quest UI.

name: questRoyal
description: Flag indicating whether the active quest is a royal quest (1) or a regular port quest (0).

name: questStartNum
description: Numeric baseline used by royal quests to compute progress (e.g., starting fleetsDefeated or alliancesMade count when the quest was accepted).

name: goal{N}
description: String content of the Nth journal goal. '0' indicates an empty slot.

name: goal{N}Done
description: Optional completion description for the Nth journal goal. '0' indicates not yet completed.

name: askNewQuestItem
description: Flag indicating the player should be offered a new tavern quest item.

name: tavern_questItem
description: Item type currently sought by the tavern quest-giver.

name: tavern_questItem_previous
description: Prior tavern quest item, copied from tavern_questItem before it changes. Used to avoid asking for the same item twice in a row.

name: hireCrewGoalDone
description: Flag set when the player completes the 'hire your first crew' goal.

name: onAMission
description: Flag (>0) indicating the player is inside a mission scenario where they cannot freely leave the zone.

name: alreadyUnlockedShortcutThisRun
description: Flag to avoid re-firing 'shortcut unlocked' dialog more than once per mission run.

name: delveLost
description: Flag set by tDelveLose when a delve/expedition is lost.

name: fleetBattleStarted
description: Flag set by tStartFleetBattle when a fleet battle begins. Gates fleet-battle-specific events.

name: partyActor{N}
description: Slot record for the Nth party actor. Cleared by tSetRefreshGlobals between mission runs.

name: spawnedCorpse1
description: Actor ID selected by the first 'spawn_corpse' TriggerEffect. Used to avoid spawning the same corpse twice.

name: spawnedCorpse2
description: Actor ID selected by the second 'spawn_corpse' TriggerEffect.

name: lastReactionActionID
description: Action ID of the most recent reaction triggered by an actor.

name: lastReactionActionActorID
description: Actor ID that performed the most recent reaction.

name: lastReactionActionCasterID
description: Caster Actor ID associated with the most recent reaction (the actor whose action triggered the reaction).

name: lastExecutedActionID
description: Action ID of the most recently executed action in the zone.

name: lastExecutedActionActorID
description: Actor ID of the caster of the most recently executed action, or empty if no caster.

readBy.where: formulas referencing the last action's caster

name: lastExecutedAvAffecterID
description: AvAffecter ID most recently executed against a target.

readBy.where: formulas and reactions referencing the last AvAffecter

name: lastExecutedAvAffecterActorID
description: Actor ID of the caster of the most recently executed AvAffecter, or empty if no caster.

readBy.where: formulas and reactions referencing the last AvAffecter caster

name: currentEvaluatedActionID
description: Action currently being previewed by the player (mouse-over or selected). Empty when no preview.

name: D_{dialogNodeID}
description: Number of times the player has been shown a particular dialog node. Used to detect first encounters and limit repetition.

name: D_{dialogNodeID}_controller
description: Companion to D_{dialogNodeID} used by dialog flow controllers (e.g., D_merchant_sPort_createPort5_controller). Tracks whether a controller dialog branch has fired.

name: investigatorAnswer_{actorID}
description: Latest answer text the named investigator NPC will deliver to the player on demand.

name: investigatorTask_{actorID}
description: Pending task string the investigator will execute on player request (e.g., 'learnJournalEntry,...').

name: tracking_{itemTypeID}
description: Permanent tracking flag for a particular item type. When >= 1, the item is shown on the world map/compass UI.

name: tracking_30d_{itemTypeID}
description: Temporary 30-day tracking flag. Shown on the world map for ~720 in-game hours after being set.

name: cartographerContractLoc
description: Location currently under the player's cartographer contract. Drives the compass tooltip icon.

name: researcherContractLoc
description: Location currently under the player's researcher contract. Drives the eyeglass tooltip icon.

name: lastFoodEaten
description: Most recent cafe food the player ate. Consumed by dialog/effects that react to the chosen meal.

name: bezoar_gated
description: Flag set to 1 when a bezoar-related dialog gate is satisfied.

name: treasureTCX
description: Tile X of the most recently located treasure spot.

name: treasureTCY
description: Tile Y of the most recently located treasure spot.

name: gpCollect_{locationID}
description: Accumulated gold-piece collectable for a port the player has invested in. Increased daily via tUpdateMyPort using the gpCollectFromPort formula.

name: incOnNewDay_{dialogNodeID}
description: Per-day throttled counter for the given dialog node. Incremented only if 24 in-game hours have elapsed since last set.

setBy.where: Task.cs dialog 'increment on new day' handler

readBy.where: Task.cs dialog 'increment on new day' handler

name: port{N}_dojo1
description: Flag (1 if cleared) for the dojo associated with port N. When all listed dojos are cleared, the DEFEAT_DOJOS achievement fires.

name: arenaBeaten
description: Flag set once the player has beaten the arena. Drives the DEFEAT_ARENA achievement.

name: TRADE_VALUE1
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for the trade value milestone. Mirrors the Steam achievement state for offline tracking.

name: ITEM_AUGMENT
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for augmenting an item.

name: CRAFT_ANYTHING
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for crafting any item.

name: DISCOVER_JOURNAL1
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for discovering the first journal entry.

name: DIG_FINDITEM
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for digging up an item.

name: WIN_ANYDIFFICULTY
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for winning on any difficulty.

name: DEFEAT_SM_FLEET
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for defeating a small fleet.

name: DEFEAT_MERCHANT_FLEET
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for defeating a merchant fleet.

name: DEFEAT_BATTLE_FLEET
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for defeating a battle fleet.

name: DEFEAT_ELITE_FLEET
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for defeating an elite fleet.

name: MAP_100PERCENT
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for completing the world map. Auto-triggered when mapCompleted > 0.

name: DEFEAT_DOJOS
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for clearing all dojos. Triggered by port{N}_dojo1 set conditions.

name: DEFEAT_ARENA
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for defeating the arena. Triggered when arenaBeaten > 0.

name: RANK_ROYALMAX
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for reaching the maximum royal rank. Triggered when playerRank >= 9.

name: DISCOVER_GROVE1
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for discovering 15 groves. Triggered when grovesDiscovered >= 15.

name: DISCOVER_PORTS1
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for discovering 30 ports. Triggered when portsDiscovered >= 30.

name: FAME_ALL_HIGH
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for reaching 1000 fame in all three fame categories simultaneously.

name: FAME_SUPERHIGH1
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for reaching 5000 fame in any single fame category.

name: ESTABLISH_PORT1
description: Achievement-mirror flag (>= 1 means earned) for establishing the special player-built port. Triggered by the createPort5 dialog node having been seen.

setBy.note: triggered by D_merchant_sPort_createPort5 or its controller

name: {itemTypeID with replaceWith_globalVarMatch}

params.name: itemTypeID
params.note: the item type's own ID becomes the gVar name

description: Per-itemType spawn counter, used when an item type has the replaceWith_globalVarMatch special property. Incremented every time the item spawns; reset to 0 when an item with replaceWith_resetGlobalVarWhenAllSpawned indicates the spawn batch is complete.

name: {itemTypeID with setGlobalVarWhenConverted}

params.name: itemTypeID
params.note: the item type's own ID becomes the gVar name

description: Per-itemType acquired counter for items with the setGlobalVarWhenConverted special property (e.g., crafting kits, class masks). Incremented at end of run by the converted quantity.

name: {actorID as gVar name}

params.name: actorID
params.note: the actor's ID is used as the variable name

description: Some scripts store data on a globalVar whose name is itself an Actor.ID. Exact semantics depend on the dialog/script that writes it; ZoneManager.cs and Task.cs use getGlobalVar_string(actorID) for ad-hoc per-actor associations.

setBy.where: dialog/trigger setGlobalVar effects using actor IDs as the var name

notes: Recorded here for completeness; concrete uses could not be enumerated.
